title: Section 2
content: (1) The Ajmer-Merwara Agrarian Relief (Second) Ordinance, 1949 (30 of 1949), is hereby repealed. (2) When this Act or any portion thereof comes into force in Ajmer, so much of any Act, Regulation or notification in force therein, or any condition of a jagir or istimrari sanad, as is inconsistent with this Act or with such portion, shall be deemed to have been repealed or superseded by this Act or by such portion, as the case may be.
